subgoal: Tap the message body area to move focus away from the To field (so we can access the Subject field next).
acceptance_criteria: The To field (recipient chip) is no longer focused and the cursor/focus moves to the compose area (subject/body becomes accessible).

llm_result.reason: Still on Gmail compose screen with keyboard visible and one editable widget focused; the UI continues to show the To/recipient area (chip group and 'Add recipient') without any clear indication that focus moved into the subject/body compose area. No semantic focus shift away from the To field is evident.

notable_changes: Minor reflow/redisplay of To area text (e.g., 'Add recipient' appears as separate text), but no clear transition to subject/body focus

suspicious_signals: Focused editable widget count unchanged (1) with no indication focus moved from To to body/subject

final.reason: Still on Gmail compose screen with keyboard visible and one editable widget focused; the UI continues to show the To/recipient area (chip group and 'Add recipient') without any clear indication that focus moved into the subject/body compose area. No semantic focus shift away from the To field is evident.
